Name: MAP_OBJECT_WHITE_DOOR_PARAM
Description: Defines behavior for white fog-style doors, including category rules, timing, multiplayer sound effects, interaction prompts, and progression flags.

Fields.Name: White Door Category
Fields.Description: Defines the category/type of white door behavior or grouping rules.

Fields.Name: Wait Time
Fields.Description: Time in seconds the player must wait before the door interaction completes or becomes active.

Fields.Name: Default SFX ID (White / Gray)
Fields.Description: Sound effect used for standard interactions in single-player or non-hostile states.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer SFX ID (Black)
Fields.Description: Sound effect used when interacting with the door in multiplayer or hostile contexts.

Fields.Name: Front Entry Key Guide Parameter ID
Fields.Description: UI prompt ID shown when entering the door from the front.

Fields.Name: Back Entry Key Guide Parameter ID
Fields.Description: UI prompt ID shown when entering the door from the rear.

Fields.Name: Pass Through Event Flag
Fields.Description: Event flag set when the door has been successfully passed or opened.

Fields.Name: Enable Key Guide Flag
Fields.Description: Flag that controls whether interaction prompts are enabled for this door.
